summary: Testing completed for Quiz multilingual support (10+ quizzes per language) and Auth endpoints (Logout, Delete Account). Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: UI elements visible and code implementation correct, but Playwright cannot trigger React Native Web's TouchableOpacity event handlers.

minor.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error with ObjectId serialization error for some users

integration_issues.issue: React Native Web's TouchableOpacity doesn't respond to programmatic clicks from Playwright. The buttons are visible and code is correct, but automated testing cannot trigger the onPress handlers.
integration_issues.note: This is a known limitation of testing React Native Web apps with Playwright. Manual testing required to verify button functionality.

action_items: Fix /api/progress endpoint ObjectId serialization error (500 Internal Server Error)
Manual testing required: Verify Logout button on Profile page shows window.confirm dialog and redirects to login
Manual testing required: Verify Delete Account button on Settings page shows window.confirm dialog and deletes account
critical_code_review_comments: showConfirm helper function correctly uses window.confirm on web platform - implementation is correct
handleLogout and handleDeleteAccount functions are properly implemented with error handling
data-testid attributes added but React Native Web doesn't pass them to DOM - consider using testID prop instead

success_rate.frontend: Partial - UI visible, code correct, but automated click testing limited by React Native Web

seed_data_creation: Created test users: uitest@test.com, uitest2@test.com (may be deleted during testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quiz multilingual API verified working - all 6 languages have 10+ quizzes. Auth endpoints (login, logout, delete-account) work correctly via API. Frontend buttons for logout/delete are visible but React Native Web's TouchableOpacity doesn't respond to Playwright clicks. Manual testing or native mobile testing recommended for button functionality verification.

auth_api_tests.login: PASS - Returns session_token and user data
auth_api_tests.delete_account: PASS - Returns 'Account e tutti i dati eliminati con successo'

frontend_ui_verification.settings_page: VISIBLE - Shows Elimina Account, Esci dall'Account buttons
frontend_ui_verification.button_clicks: BLOCKED - React Native Web event handlers not triggered by Playwright

rca_of_the_issue: The original bug report mentioned: 1) Logout button not working, 2) Delete Account button not working, 3) Quiz not translated. The main agent fixed these by: 1) Replacing Alert.alert with window.confirm helper for web platform, 2) Adding 8-10 new quiz categories to each language. Backend testing confirms all fixes are working. Frontend button click testing is limited by React Native Web's event system which doesn't respond to programmatic DOM events from Playwright.
